atomic_units.action: Ship the laptop to the employee's registered address at least 2 business days before the joining date.
atomic_units.condition: If the employee is joining remotely

atomic_units.action: Confirm the shipping address with the employee before raising the IT request.
atomic_units.condition: If the employee is joining remotely

atomic_units.action: Conduct document collection via the HR portal.
atomic_units.condition: If the employee is joining remotely

atomic_units.action: Replace original document verification with a self‑attestation declaration.
atomic_units.condition: If the employee is joining remotely

atomic_units.action: Conduct the HR induction session via video conferencing.
atomic_units.condition: If the employee is joining remotely

atomic_units.action: Share all induction materials digitally before the session.
atomic_units.condition: If the employee is joining remotely

atomic_units.action: Conduct the buddy orientation meeting via video conferencing.
atomic_units.condition: If the employee is joining remotely
